l.
v

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 26, 1998


Lonna B. Smith
County Clerk
Sutter County
1160 Civic Center Blvd.
Yuba City, CA 95993

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-98-068

Dear Ms. Smith:

This letter is a response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the Political
Reform Act (the "Act").1

QUESTION

In your letter, dated February 26, 1998, and our phone conversation of March 10, 1998,
you asked what additional duties you had in your attempt to get the Yuba Sutter Chapter
California Congress of Republicans, ID number 921729, to terminate its committee, due to the
fact that the treasurer of this committee has left the state.

CONCLUSION

Since you indicated that you have already tried to contact the committee and have also
contacted your District Attorney's office, you have satisfied your duties as a filing officer
concerning this matter.

FACTS

The Yuba Sutter Chapter California Congress of Republicans (committee) is a recipient

_________________________

1 Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 -
18995, of the California Code of Regulations.

Lonna B. Smith
Our File No. A-98-068
Page 2

committee, as defined by Section 82013. In September, 1997, you forwarded a memo to the
Sutter County District Attorney's office regarding a fine you were imposing against the
committee for an overdue campaign filing.

You again contacted the District Attorney on January 13, 1998, and were informed by
that office that Wayne Williams, treasurer for the committee, had left the state.

ANALYSIS

Section 81010(c) and (d) require filing officers to:

"Notify promptly all persons and known committees who have
failed to file a report or statement in the form and at the time
required by this title (and) report apparent violations of this title to
the appropriate agencies."

Sincerely,

Steven Churchwell
General Counsel

By: Kevin S. Moen
Political Reform Consultant
